import express from "express"
import authRouter from "./auth.router.js"
import quanLyNguoiDungRouter from "./quan-ly-nguoi-dung.router.js"
import quanLyPhimRouter from "./quan-ly-phim.router.js"
import quanLyRapRouter from "./quan-ly-rap.router.js"
import quanLyDatVeRouter from "./quan-ly-dat-ve.router.js"

const rootRouter = express.Router()

rootRouter.use("/auth", authRouter)
rootRouter.use("/QuanLyNguoiDung", quanLyNguoiDungRouter)
rootRouter.use("/QuanLyPhim", quanLyPhimRouter)
rootRouter.use("/QuanLyRap", quanLyRapRouter)
rootRouter.use("/QuanLyDatVe", quanLyDatVeRouter)

export default rootRouter

dat_ve         dat_ve[]
  phim           phim     @relation(fields: [ma_phim], references: [ma_phim], onDelete: NoAction, onUpdate: NoAction, map: "fk_lich_chieu_phim")
  rap_phim       rap_phim @relation(fields: [ma_rap], references: [ma_rap], onDelete: NoAction, onUpdate: NoAction, map: "fk_lich_chieu_rap")

  @@index([ma_rap], map: "fk_lich_chieu_rap")
  @@index([ma_phim], map: "fk_lich_chieu_phim")
}

model dat_ve {
  id            Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  tai_khoan     String     @db.VarChar(50)
  ma_lich_chieu Int
  ma_ghe        Int
  ngay_dat      DateTime   @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(0)
  ghe           ghe        @relation(fields: [ma_ghe], references: [ma_ghe], onDelete: NoAction, onUpdate: NoAction, map: "fk_dat_ve_ghe")
  lich_chieu    lich_chieu @relation(fields: [ma_lich_chieu], references: [ma_lich_chieu], onDelete: NoAction, onUpdate: NoAction, map: "fk_dat_ve_lich_chieu")
  nguoi_dung    nguoi_dung @relation(fields: [tai_khoan], references: [tai_khoan], onDelete: NoAction, onUpdate: NoAction, map: "fk_dat_ve_nguoi_dung")

  @@unique([ma_lich_chieu, ma_ghe], map: "uq_ve_lich_chieu_ghe")
  @@index([tai_khoan], map: "fk_dat_ve_nguoi_dung")
  @@index([ma_ghe], map: "fk_dat_ve_ghe")
